---
title: "Talks"
---

## Talks

::: {.talk-row}
::: {.talk-place}
Chapel Hill
:::
::: {.talk-content}
::: {.talk-title}
Conference on Extreme Value Analysis – Chapel Hill, USA
:::

::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::

[Website](https://eva2025.unc.edu/){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/eva2025.pdf){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-row}
::: {.talk-place}
Dresden
:::
::: {.talk-content}
::: {.talk-title}
German Probability and Statistics Days – Dresden, Germany
:::

::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::

[Slides](slides/gpsd2025.pdf){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-row}
::: {.talk-place}
Online
:::
::: {.talk-content}
::: {.talk-title}
ECOSTA – online
:::

::: {.talk-date}
2025
:::

[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/EcoSta2025/index.php){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/ecosta2025.pdf){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.talk-row}
::: {.talk-place}
Berlin
:::
::: {.talk-content}
::: {.talk-title}
CMStatistics – Berlin, Germany
:::

::: {.talk-date}
2023
:::

[Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/CMStatistics2023/index.php){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[Slides](slides/cmstatistics2023.pdf){.talk-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
